race.comment: THE DEVIL IN HER (3) gets the nod. She was a good winner over a mile three back and has been close up in two runs since, getting home well off a slow speed last week at Sandown Lakeside. Turns around quickly now and will be very hard to hold out. PARIAH PEARL (7) was much better last start when fourth over 1600m at Sandown Lakeside. She's untested at this trip but looks like she'll handle it and expect she'll give a bold sight. ALL SO CLEAR (1) got the job done at Pakenham Synthetic last start and has claims for the double. MIDNIGHT GLOW (8) next best from LONGER ROUTE (6) who has been well backed.
